tasks.title: Add tests to bring cmd/task (88.6%), cmd/orchestrator (91.3%), internal/state (91.8%), internal/invoke (93.0%), internal/validate (93.7%) to 94%+ each
tasks.description: Add tests to bring cmd/task (88.6%), cmd/orchestrator (91.3%), internal/state (91.8%), internal/invoke (93.0%), internal/validate (93.7%) to 94%+ each
tasks.body: These packages are close to threshold. Identify the specific uncovered lines and add targeted tests to push each over 94%.

tasks.title: Verify overall project coverage reaches 94%
tasks.body: After all other coverage work is done, run go test -coverprofile=cover.out ./... and verify total coverage is 94%+.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Coverage: cmd/task, cmd/orchestrator & remaining is complete and correct

breadcrumbs.text: Added targeted tests for internal/invoke (93.0% → 95.8%) and internal/validate (93.7% → 94.7%). cmd/task, cmd/orchestrator, and internal/state were already above 94%. Invoke coverage gains from MarkerSkip/MarkerContinue String() and detection tests. Validate gains from RecoverRootIndex nil-Nodes paths and tryCloseTruncated escape-handling paths.
Verified overall project coverage: 95.6% (target was 94%). All 26 packages pass tests. Every package is at or above 91.6%. No changes needed.

Audit passed. Build, vet, gofmt, full test suite (26 packages), and race detector all clean. Code review of 75 added test lines: well-structured, no nil safety issues, no dead code, correct assertions. Coverage confirmed at 95.8% (invoke) and 94.7% (validate). No ADRs/specs needed for pure test additions.

audit.result_summary: Targeted coverage tests were added for internal/invoke (93.0% → 95.8%) and internal/validate (93.7% → 94.7%), bringing both above the 94% threshold. cmd/task, cmd/orchestrator, and internal/state were already above target and required no changes. Overall project coverage reached 95.6%, exceeding the 94% goal. Audit verified: full build, vet, gofmt, 26-package test suite, and race detector all pass cleanly. No issues found.
